summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. The preflight artifact marks all 16 refs as open pull requests, reports no security-sensitive items, and states this is not a dedupe cluster. No shared canonical is invented; each PR is kept independently for normal maintainer review or author/proof follow-up.
